column1: Pair derivable from public station coordinates and satellite ephemerides only. No operator or contractual attestation.

Per-orbit communication metrics are modeled-precision via 3GPP TR 38.811 + ITU-R P.618-14 / P.676-13 and handover decisions use the demo-balanced-v1 policy (TR 38.821 §7.3.2.2 + V-MO1 verbal addendum), not measured service telemetry.

Satellite candidates are limited to orbit classes disclosed by both selected stations (LEO/MEO/GEO), ranked by TLE/SGP4 pair-visibility geometry, then capped at LEO 200, MEO 100, GEO 60 records for interactive compute.
TLE snapshot artifacts are attributed to CelesTrak public GP data; the browser reads bundled files only.
SATCAT constellation membership in this TLE snapshot: 600 ONEWEB, 33 GALILEO, 6 INTELSAT.
